title: Windows Firewall Rule Modification
description: Detects modification of Windows Firewall rules via netsh. Attackers disable or modify firewall rules to enable lateral movement or C2 communication.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*netsh.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*advfirewall firewall add*' or 'Command Line' like '*advfirewall set allprofiles state off*' or 'Command Line' like '*advfirewall firewall delete*' or 'Command Line' like '*advfirewall firewall set rule*')))
